sizing_rule.note: When dependency is detected in trade results (95% confidence via runs test), split system into sub-systems (e.g., post-win vs post-loss trades) and recalculate optimal f on filtered subsets. Use the higher optimal_f value achieved after removing dependency. Specific f value not provided by author—must be computed empirically.

source_rule_text: When dependency is detected in trading results, exploit it by adjusting system rules (such as splitting into separate systems for post-win and post-loss trades) to increase the optimal f value and improve position sizing.
